name: Block malicious source IP on Lab Firewall
description: TEMPLATE (UML step 5). Fill the __SOURCE_IP__ placeholder (or the 'source_ip' playbook variable) with the malicious test IP from the exercise brief, then submit to NG-SOAR for validation.

source_ip.description: Malicious source IP to block (from the exercise brief)

action--block-ip.name: Block source IP on the Lab Target Service (nftables input)
action--block-ip.description: Drop all inbound traffic to the target whose source address is the malicious IP.

commands.command: sudo nft add rule inet filter input ip saddr __SOURCE_IP__ counter drop
